description_cn: Simulates sharp local load growth, transformer overload, severe line overload, and feeder-end voltage drops caused by large-scale uncontrolled EV charging during peak demand.
description_en: Simulates voltage drops and transformer overloading caused by large-scale uncontrolled EV charging during peak demand.
typical_user_requests: Create an uncontrolled EV charging scenario

validation_rules.message_cn: EV charging simulation must be enabled for an uncontrolled EV charging scenario; the current configuration conflicts with the scenario semantics.
Both the charging demand multiplier and the number of added charging spots are low, so the uncontrolled EV charging characteristics may not be visible.
High EV charging demand combined with high base load may cause severe transformer overload. Evaluate system capacity safety.

result_interpretation_focus: Analyze the distribution of low-voltage nodes and assess the effect of EV charging on feeder-end voltage.
Monitor EV charging satisfaction to determine whether the control strategy excessively sacrifices user charging needs.
Inspect transformer and main branch loading rates to identify severe overload bottlenecks.
